title: Appendix 4: Mapping Connections: An understanding of neurological conditions in Canada - Canada.ca

## Appendix 4: Mapping Connections: An understanding of neurological conditions in Canada

### National Population Health Study of Neurological Conditions: Implementation Committee
- Celina Rayonne Chavannes, MBA Director, Research Initiatives, Neurological Health Charities Canada Co-chair, Implementation Committee
- Sulan Dai, MD, PhD Senior Epidemiologist, Chronic Disease Surveillance Division, Public Health Agency of Canada
- Frances Gardiner, RN Program Officer, Chronic Disease Surveillance Division, Public Health Agency of Canada
- Nathalie Gendron, PhD Assistant Director, Institute of Neurosciences, Mental Health and Addiction, Canadian Institutes of Health Research
- Joyce Gordon President and Chief Executive Officer, Parkinson Society Canada Chair, Neurological Health Charities Canada
- Deanna Groetzinger, MA Vice-President, Government Relations and Policy, Multiple Sclerosis Society of Canada
- Deanna Huggett, MSc Senior Policy Analyst, Continuing Care Unit, Health Canada
- Susan Latter, MRT(R), MSCS Stakeholder Representative
- Suzanne Nurse, PhD Volunteer, Canadian Epilepsy Alliance
- Jay Onysko, MA Acting Director, Chronic Disease Surveillance Division, Public Health Agency of Canada Co-Chair, Implementation Committee
- Nalini Sen, MA Director, Research Program, Alzheimer Society of Canada
- David Taylor, PhD Director of Research, ALS Canada
- Stacey Thompson, BSc Project Coordinator, Neurological Health Charities Canada Secretariat, Implementation Committee
